overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through lush grasslands and scattered pine forests. The character passes weathered stone ruins and a large stone monument while exploring the open world environment under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path through tall grass meadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland with two swords on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks
tall green and golden grass covering the meadow hills
tall coniferous trees dotting the landscape in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through open grasslands. Tall green grass surrounds the trail on both sides, with scattered pine trees visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky. The environment is peaceful and devoid of other characters or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside ancient stone wall ruins

events.description: weathered stone wall with wooden fence posts comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path passing by the stone ruins on the left

entered.detail: low weathered stone wall with broken sections suggesting ancient construction
vertical wooden posts attached to the stone wall

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues walking, a weathered stone wall with wooden fence posts appears on the left side of the path. The wall runs parallel to the trail for a stretch before falling behind. The surrounding landscape remains grassy with scattered trees visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: path approaching large stone monument ruins

events.description: large stone ruin structure becomes visible ahead on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a large stone monument while maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall weathered stone structure resembling a ruined tower or ancient monument

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as Geralt approaches a prominent stone ruin on the right side. The large weathered monument stands tall among the grass as the character walks past it. The stone wall from the previous section falls behind as the trail continues through the meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open trail with distant mountain vista

events.description: distant mountains become visible on the left horizon as the stone monument passes out of view

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant tree line with mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: hazy mountain peaks visible on the horizon
simple wooden fence running alongside the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone monument, the view opens up to reveal distant mountains on the left horizon. A simple wooden fence appears on the right side of the path. Geralt continues walking toward a denser forest area ahead, with the trail winding through the tall grass under the cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt path that transitions from open, peaceful grasslands into a landscape marked by ancient ruins and distant mountains. It begins with Geralt walking through tall green grass under a partly cloudy sky, with scattered pine trees dotting the horizon. As he progresses, the environment shifts to include a weathered stone wall and wooden fence posts that flank the trail before falling away. The scene then opens up as the camera passes a prominent, weathered stone monument standing tall in the meadow, leading toward a wider vista where distant mountains emerge on the left horizon. Finally, the path winds past a simple wooden fence and heads toward a denser forest area, maintaining the steady forward motion through the lush terrain.
